name: input-group-label
visual_summary: The input group label is a text or icon container that is typically used in conjunction with an <input>. It is visually connected to the input element and provides additional context or functionality for the input field. Developers would use this component when they need to provide clear labels or icons for user input.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready form component with the following characteristics:

Name: input-group-label
Description: The input group label is a text or icon container that is typically used in conjunction with an <input>. It is visually connected to the input element and provides additional context or functionality for the input field. Developers would use this component when they need to provide clear labels or icons for user input.
Style: minimal
Interactions: hover
Tags: input, form, label

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
